  • NK 模型

    • 带货币的 RBC 模型
      • Example 1
      • Example 3
      • Example 4 Simple MIU
    • NK 基准模型

    # NK 模型

    # 带货币的 RBC 模型

    我们列出带货币的 RBC；MIU 模型和 CIA 模型，说明真实商业周期模型下依旧有以下几种可能。

    1. 带有货币
    2. 存在扭曲或者无效率
    3. 存在内生的扭曲或无效率
    4. 存在货币的非中性作用

    但以上模型中即使有货币的供需问题，依旧是“价格中性”的。

    # Example 1

    已知有如下的居民效用函数：Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k){\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty}\beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k})Et​∑k=0+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​)；Ct+kC_{t+k}Ct+k​ 为 t+kt+kt+k 时的居民消费，Nt+kN_{t+k}Nt+k​ 为 t+kt+kt+k 时的劳动供给，经济中并不存在实物资本。

    已知此时经济中的生产技术如下 Yt=AtNtαY_t= A_tN_t^\alphaYt​=At​Ntα​，市场出清为 Yt=CtY_t=C_tYt​=Ct​，技术服从 ln⁡At+1=ρAln⁡At+εt+1\ln A_{t+1}= \rho_A \ln A_t + \varepsilon_{t+1}lnAt+1​=ρA​lnAt​+εt+1​。

    (1) 求解此时的中央计划者经济。

    (2) 若满足效用函数 u(Ct,Nt)=Ct1−σ1−σ−ϕLNt1+ϕ1+ϕu(C_t,N_t)= \frac{C_t^{1-\sigma}}{1-\sigma}-\phi_L \frac{N_t^{1+\phi}}{1+\phi}u(Ct​,Nt​)=1−σCt1−σ​​−ϕL​1+ϕNt1+ϕ​​，求解上述方程的稳态与一阶差分（对数线性化）近似（当 ϕL=α\phi_L=\alphaϕL​=α 时）。

    # Example 3

    考虑如下的分散化经济

    居民效用

    Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k){\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} \beta^k u(C_{t+ k},N_{t+k}) Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​)

    其中 Ct+kC_{t+k}Ct+k​ 为 t+kt+kt+k 时的居民消费，Nt+kN_{t+k}Nt+k​ 为 t+kt+kt+k 时的劳动供给，经济中并不存在实物资本。

    居民融资约束

    PtCt+QtBt+1=Bt+WtNt+TtP_tC_t + Q_t B_{t+1} = B_t + W_t N_t + T_t Pt​Ct​+Qt​Bt+1​=Bt​+Wt​Nt​+Tt​

    其中 PtP_tPt​ 为消费品价格，CtC_tCt​ 为消费品产量，WtW_tWt​ 为名义工资，NtN_tNt​ 为劳动供给，TtT_tTt​ 为居民的转移支付，BtB_tBt​ 为时刻 ttt 通过国债获得的收益，Bt+1B_{t+1}Bt+1​ 为 t+1t+1t+1 时刻的国债收益，QtQ_tQt​ 为时刻 t+1t+1t+1 获得 111 单位的名义收入的短期国债，在时刻 ttt 出售的名义价格，因此 Rt+1N=1QtR_{t+1}^N = \frac1{Q_t}Rt+1N​=Qt​1​，Rt+1NR_{t+1}^NRt+1N​ 为债券的名义利率。

    最终产品厂商利润

    ΠtF=PtYt−WtNt\Pi_t^F = P_tY_t -W_t N_t ΠtF​=Pt​Yt​−Wt​Nt​

    其中 PtP_tPt​ 为最终产品价格，YtY_tYt​ 为最终产出，WtW_tWt​ 为名义工资，NtN_tNt​ 为劳动需求。

    生产函数为

    Yt=AtNtαY_t = A_t N_t^\alpha Yt​=At​Ntα​

    市场出清方程

    1. 实物市场产品出清

      Yt=CtY_t = C_t Yt​=Ct​

    2. 国债市场出清

      Bt=0B_t = 0 Bt​=0

    冲击设定

    ln⁡At+1=ρln⁡At+εt+1A\ln A_{t+1} = \rho \ln A_t + \varepsilon_{t+1}^A lnAt+1​=ρlnAt​+εt+1A​

    稳态下 ln⁡At+1=ln⁡At=1\ln A_{t+1}= \ln A_t =1lnAt+1​=lnAt​=1

    （1） 写出居民的欧拉方程和劳动供给方程。

    解：

    居民值函数

    V(Bt;Qt,Pt,Wt,Tt)≜max⁡Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k)s.t.PtCt+QtBt+1=Bt+WtNt+Tt\begin{align*}V(B_t;Q_t,P_t,W_t,T_t)\triangleq \max \quad & {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+ \infty} \beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k})\\ & \text{s.t.} \quad P_t C_t + Q_t B_{t+1} = B_t + W_t N_t + T_t\end{align*}V(Bt​;Qt​,Pt​,Wt​,Tt​)≜max​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​)s.t.Pt​Ct​+Qt​Bt+1​=Bt​+Wt​Nt​+Tt​​

    V(Bt;Qt,Pt,Wt,Tt)≜max⁡u(Ct,Nt)+βEtV(Bt+1;Qt+1,Pt+1,Wt+1,Tt+1)s.t.PtCt+QtBt+1=Bt+WtNt+Tt\begin{align*}V(B_t;Q_t,P_t,W_t,T_t)\triangleq \max \quad & u(C_{t},N_{t})+\beta{\mathbb E}_tV(B_{t+1};Q_{t+1},P_{t+1},W_{t+1},T_{t+1}) \\ & \text{s.t.} \quad P_t C_t + Q_t B_{t+1} = B_t + W_t N_t + T_t\end{align*}V(Bt​;Qt​,Pt​,Wt​,Tt​)≜max​u(Ct​,Nt​)+βEt​V(Bt+1​;Qt+1​,Pt+1​,Wt+1​,Tt+1​)s.t.Pt​Ct​+Qt​Bt+1​=Bt​+Wt​Nt​+Tt​​

    无约束最优化

    V(Bt;Qt,Pt,Wt,Tt)≜max⁡Ct,Ntu(Ct,Nt)+βEtV(Bt+1;Qt+1,Pt+1,Wt+1,Tt+1)−λt(PtCt+QtBt+1−Bt−WtNt−Tt)\begin{align*}V(B_t;Q_t,P_t,W_t,T_t)\triangleq \max_{C_t,N_t} \quad & u(C_{t},N_{t})+\beta{\mathbb E}_tV(B_{t+1};Q_{t+1},P_{t+1},W_{t+1},T_{t+1}) \\ & \quad-\lambda_t(P_t C_t + Q_t B_{t+1} - B_t - W_t N_t - T_t)\end{align*}V(Bt​;Qt​,Pt​,Wt​,Tt​)≜Ct​,Nt​max​​u(Ct​,Nt​)+βEt​V(Bt+1​;Qt+1​,Pt+1​,Wt+1​,Tt+1​)−λt​(Pt​Ct​+Qt​Bt+1​−Bt​−Wt​Nt​−Tt​)​

    FOCs

    ∂u∂C(Ct,Nt)=λtPt\frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_t,N_t) = \lambda_t P_t ∂C∂u​(Ct​,Nt​)=λt​Pt​

    ∂u∂N(Ct,Nt)=−λtWt\frac{\partial u}{\partial N}(C_t,N_t) = -\lambda_t W_t ∂N∂u​(Ct​,Nt​)=−λt​Wt​

    可得劳动供给方程

    −∂u/∂N(Ct,Nt)∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)=WtPt-\frac{\partial u/\partial N(C_t,N_t)}{\partial u/\partial C(C_t,N_t)}= \frac{W_t}{P_t} −∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)∂u/∂N(Ct​,Nt​)​=Pt​Wt​​

    βEt∂Vt+1∂Bt+1(Bt+1;St+1)=λtQt\beta {\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial V_{t+1}}{\partial B_{t+1}}(B_{t+1};S_{t+1})= \lambda_tQ_t βEt​∂Bt+1​∂Vt+1​​(Bt+1​;St+1​)=λt​Qt​

    包络定理

    ∂V∂Bt(Bt;S⃗t)=λt\frac{\partial V}{\partial B_t}(B_t;\vec S_t)=\lambda_t ∂Bt​∂V​(Bt​;St​)=λt​

    λtQt=βEt∂Vt+1∂Bt+1(Bt+1;S⃗t+1)=βEtλt+1⇒Etβλt+1λt1Qt=1\lambda_t Q_t = \beta {\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial V_{t+1}}{\partial B_{t+1}}(B_{t+1};\vec S_{t+1}) = \beta {\mathbb E}_t \lambda_{t+1} \Rightarrow {\mathbb E}_t \beta\frac{\lambda_{t+1}}{\lambda_t}\frac1{Q_t} =1 λt​Qt​=βEt​∂Bt+1​∂Vt+1​​(Bt+1​;St+1​)=βEt​λt+1​⇒Et​βλt​λt+1​​Qt​1​=1

    代入 λt=∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)Pt\lambda_t = \frac{\partial u/\partial C(C_t,N_t)}{P_t}λt​=Pt​∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)​ 可得欧拉方程（跨期投资方程）

    Et∂u/∂C(Ct+1,Nt+1)∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)PtPt+11Qt=1{\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial u/\partial C(C_{t+1},N_{t+1})}{\partial u/\partial C(C_t,N_t)}\frac{P_t}{P_{t+1}}\frac1{Q_t}=1 Et​∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)∂u/∂C(Ct+1​,Nt+1​)​Pt+1​Pt​​Qt​1​=1

    结果

    −∂u/∂N(Ct,Nt)∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)=WtPt(A-S)-\frac{\partial u/\partial N(C_t,N_t)}{\partial u/\partial C(C_t,N_t)}= \frac{W_t}{P_t}\tag{A-S} −∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)∂u/∂N(Ct​,Nt​)​=Pt​Wt​​(A-S)

    Et∂u/∂C(Ct+1,Nt+1)∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)PtPt+11Qt=1(Euler){\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial u/\partial C(C_{t+1},N_{t+1})}{\partial u/\partial C(C_t,N_t)}\frac{P_t}{P_{t+1}}\frac1{Q_t}=1\tag{Euler} Et​∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)∂u/∂C(Ct+1​,Nt+1​)​Pt+1​Pt​​Qt​1​=1(Euler)

    （2） 结合企业的利润最大化方程和市场出清方程，分析经济中的实物变量，说明此方程是价格中性的。

    解：

    企业利润方程

    max⁡Πt=PtAtNtα−WtNt\max \quad \Pi_t = P_t A_tN_t ^\alpha -W_t N_t maxΠt​=Pt​At​Ntα​−Wt​Nt​

    FOC

    WtPt=∂Yt∂Nt=αAtNtα−1(A-D)\frac{W_t}{P_t}=\frac{\partial Y_t}{\partial N_t}=\alpha A_t N_t^{\alpha-1}\tag{A-D} Pt​Wt​​=∂Nt​∂Yt​​=αAt​Ntα−1​(A-D)

    结合 (A-D) 和 (A-S) 有

    −∂u/∂N(Ct,Nt)∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)=WtPt=∂Yt∂Nt=αAtNtα−1=αYtNt-\frac{\partial u/\partial N(C_t,N_t)}{\partial u/\partial C(C_t,N_t)}=\frac{W_t}{P_t}=\frac{\partial Y_t}{\partial N_t}= \alpha A_tN_t^{\alpha-1}=\alpha \frac{Y_t}{N_t} −∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)∂u/∂N(Ct​,Nt​)​=Pt​Wt​​=∂Nt​∂Yt​​=αAt​Ntα−1​=αNt​Yt​​

    生产技术与市场出清有

    Yt=Ct=AtNtαY_t = C_t =A_t N_t^\alpha Yt​=Ct​=At​Ntα​

    技术冲击方程

    ln⁡At+1=ρln⁡At+εt+1A\ln A_{t+1}= \rho \ln A_t + \varepsilon_{t+1}^A lnAt+1​=ρlnAt​+εt+1A​

    说明此时的市场配置是独立于物价的。

    （3） 若 u(Ct,Nt)=Ct1−σ−αNt1+ϕu(C_t,N_t) = \frac{C_t}{1-\sigma}-\alpha \frac{N_t}{1+\phi}u(Ct​,Nt​)=1−σCt​​−α1+ϕNt​​，且 W∗=P∗W^*=P^*W∗=P∗，Q∗=βQ^* =\betaQ∗=β，求上述问题的对数线性化。

    解：

    对 y^t,n^t,c^t\hat y_t,\hat n_t, \hat c_ty^​t​,n^t​,c^t​ 类似问题2，可以获得

    ϕn^t+σc^t=a^t+(α−1)n^t(1)\phi \hat n_t + \sigma \hat c_t = \hat a_t + (\alpha -1)\hat n_t\tag1 ϕn^t​+σc^t​=a^t​+(α−1)n^t​(1)

    c^t=y^t=a^t+αn^t(2)\hat c_t = \hat y_t = \hat a_t + \alpha \hat n_t \tag2 c^t​=y^​t​=a^t​+αn^t​(2)

    a^t+1=ρAa^t+εt+1A(3)\hat a_{t+1} = \rho _A \hat a_t + \varepsilon_{t+1}^A\tag3 a^t+1​=ρA​a^t​+εt+1A​(3)

    同时有

    WtPt=αYtAt⇒w^t−p^t=y^t−a^t\frac{W_t}{P_t}=\alpha \frac{Y_t}{A_t}\Rightarrow \hat w_t -\hat p_t = \hat y_t -\hat a_t Pt​Wt​​=αAt​Yt​​⇒w^t​−p^​t​=y^​t​−a^t​

    对 Et∂u/∂C(Ct+1,Nt+1)∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)PtPt+11Qt=1{\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial u/\partial C(C_{t+1},N_{t+1})}{\partial u/\partial C(C_t,N_t)}\frac{P_t}{P_{t+1}}\frac1{Q_t}=1Et​∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)∂u/∂C(Ct+1​,Nt+1​)​Pt+1​Pt​​Qt​1​=1，定义如下：

    i^t=ln⁡Rt+1N−ln⁡RN∗=Rt+1N−RN∗RN∗\hat i_t = \ln R_{t+1}^N - \ln R^{N*}= \frac{R_{t+1}^N-R^{N*}}{R^{N*}} i^t​=lnRt+1N​−lnRN∗=RN∗Rt+1N​−RN∗​

    w^t=ln⁡Wt−ln⁡W∗=Wt−W∗W∗\hat w_t = \ln W_t -\ln W^* = \frac{W_t - W^*}{W^*} w^t​=lnWt​−lnW∗=W∗Wt​−W∗​

    p^t=ln⁡Pt−ln⁡P∗=Pt−P∗P∗\hat p_t = \ln P_t -\ln P^* = \frac{P_t - P^*}{P^*} p^​t​=lnPt​−lnP∗=P∗Pt​−P∗​

    可得

    −σEtc^t+1+σc^t+p^t−Etp^t+1+i^t=0-\sigma {\mathbb E}_t \hat c_{t+1} + \sigma \hat c_t + \hat p_t - {\mathbb E}_t \hat p_{t+1} + \hat i_t =0 −σEt​c^t+1​+σc^t​+p^​t​−Et​p^​t+1​+i^t​=0

    引入

    Etp^t+1−p^t≜Etπ^t+1{\mathbb E}_t \hat p_{t+1} -\hat p_t \triangleq {\mathbb E}_t \hat \pi_{t+1} Et​p^​t+1​−p^​t​≜Et​π^t+1​

    因 ln⁡Pt+1Pt−ln⁡P∗P∗=ln⁡πt+1−ln⁡π∗=π^t+1\ln \frac{P_{t+1}}{P_t} -\ln \frac{P^*}{P^*}= \ln \pi_{t+1}-\ln \pi^*= \hat \pi_{t+1}lnPt​Pt+1​​−lnP∗P∗​=lnπt+1​−lnπ∗=π^t+1​

    可得

    c^t=Etc^t+1−1σ(i^t−Etπ^t+1)\hat c_t = {\mathbb E}_t \hat c_{t+1} -\frac1\sigma (\hat i_t- {\mathbb E}_t \hat \pi_{t+1}) c^t​=Et​c^t+1​−σ1​(i^t​−Et​π^t+1​)

    有

    w^t−p^t=y^t−a^t\hat w_t -\hat p_t = \hat y_t -\hat a_t w^t​−p^​t​=y^​t​−a^t​

    c^t=Etc^t+1−1σ(i^t−Etπ^t+1)\hat c_t = {\mathbb E}_t \hat c_{t+1} -\frac1\sigma(\hat i_t -{\mathbb E}_t \hat \pi _{t+1}) c^t​=Et​c^t+1​−σ1​(i^t​−Et​π^t+1​)

    # Example 4 Simple MIU

    居民效用

    Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k,Mt+kPt+k){\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} \beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k},\frac{M_{t+k}}{P_{t+k}}) Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​,Pt+k​Mt+k​​)

    融资约束

    PtCt+QtBt+1+Mt+1=Bt+WtNt+Tt+MtP_t C_t + Q_t B_{t+1}+ M_{t+1}= B_t + W_tN_t + T_t + M_t Pt​Ct​+Qt​Bt+1​+Mt+1​=Bt​+Wt​Nt​+Tt​+Mt​

    企业利润

    ΠtF=PtYt−WtNt\Pi_t^F = P_tY_t -W_t N_t ΠtF​=Pt​Yt​−Wt​Nt​

    生产函数

    Yt=AtNtαY_t = A_tN_t^\alpha Yt​=At​Ntα​

    市场出清方程

    1. 实物市场产品出清

      Yt=CtY_t= C_t Yt​=Ct​

    2. 国债市场出清

      Bt=0B_t = 0 Bt​=0

    冲击设定

    ln⁡At+1=ρln⁡At+εt+1A\ln A_{t+1} = \rho \ln A_t + \varepsilon_{t+1}^A lnAt+1​=ρlnAt​+εt+1A​

    稳态技术下

    ln⁡At+1=ln⁡At=1\ln A_{t+1} = \ln A_t =1 lnAt+1​=lnAt​=1

    （1） 写出居民的欧拉方程和劳动供给方程、货币需求方程。

    解：

    V(Bt,Mt−1;Qt,Pt,Wt,Tt)≜max⁡Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k,Mt+kPt+k)s.t.Mt+PtCt+QtBt+1=Bt+WtNt+Tt+Mt−1\begin{align*}V(B_t,M_{t-1};Q_t,P_t,W_t,T_t)\triangleq \max \quad & {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} \beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k},\frac{M_{t+k}}{P_{t+k}})\\ & \text{s.t.}\quad M_t + P_t C_t + Q_t B_{t+1}= B_t + W_t N_t + T_t + M_{t-1} \end{align*}V(Bt​,Mt−1​;Qt​,Pt​,Wt​,Tt​)≜max​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​,Pt+k​Mt+k​​)s.t.Mt​+Pt​Ct​+Qt​Bt+1​=Bt​+Wt​Nt​+Tt​+Mt−1​​

    FOCs

    ∂u∂C=λtPt\frac{\partial u}{\partial C}= \lambda_t P_t ∂C∂u​=λt​Pt​

    ∂u∂N=−λtWt\frac{\partial u}{\partial N}= -\lambda_t W_t ∂N∂u​=−λt​Wt​

    βEt∂Vt+1∂Bt+1=λtQt\beta {\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial V_{t+1}}{\partial B_{t+1}}= \lambda_t Q_t βEt​∂Bt+1​∂Vt+1​​=λt​Qt​

    可得劳动供给方程

    −∂u/∂N∂u/∂C=WtPt-\frac{\partial u/\partial N}{\partial u/\partial C}= \frac{W_t}{P_t} −∂u/∂C∂u/∂N​=Pt​Wt​​

    包络定理可得跨期投资方程

    Etβ∂u/∂C(Ct+1,Nt+1,Mt+1Pt+1)∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt,MtPt)1Qt=1{\mathbb E}_t \beta \frac{\partial u/\partial C(C_{t+1},N_{t+1},\frac{M_{t+1}}{P_{t+1}})}{\partial u/\partial C(C_{t},N_{t},\frac{M_{t}}{P_{t}})}\frac1{Q_t} = 1 Et​β∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​,Pt​Mt​​)∂u/∂C(Ct+1​,Nt+1​,Pt+1​Mt+1​​)​Qt​1​=1

    对于 FOC: 对 MtM_tMt​ 有

    βEtVM(Bt+1,Mt;S⃗t+1)+∂u∂(M/P)(Ct,Nt,MtPt)1Pt=λt\beta {\mathbb E}_t V_M(B_{t+1},M_{t};\vec S_{t+1}) + \frac{\partial u}{\partial (M/P)}\left( C_t ,N_t ,\frac{M_t}{P_t}\right)\frac1{P_t}=\lambda_t βEt​VM​(Bt+1​,Mt​;St+1​)+∂(M/P)∂u​(Ct​,Nt​,Pt​Mt​​)Pt​1​=λt​

    包络： 对 Mt−1M_{t-1}Mt−1​ 有

    ∂Vt∂Mt−1(Bt,Mt−1;St⃗)=λt\frac{\partial V_t}{\partial M_{t-1}}(B_t,M_{t-1};\vec {S_t})=\lambda_t ∂Mt−1​∂Vt​​(Bt​,Mt−1​;St​​)=λt​

    代入之后

    ∂u∂(M/P)(Ct,Nt,MtPt)1Pt∂u∂C(Ct,Nt,MtPt)1Pt=1−Etβλt+1λt=1−Qt\frac{\frac{\partial u}{\partial (M/P)}(C_t,N_t,\frac{M_t}{P_t})\frac1{P_t}}{\frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_t,N_t,\frac{M_t}{P_t})\frac1{P_t}}= 1-{\mathbb E}_t \beta \frac{\lambda_{t+1}}{\lambda_t}= 1-Q_t ∂C∂u​(Ct​,Nt​,Pt​Mt​​)Pt​1​∂(M/P)∂u​(Ct​,Nt​,Pt​Mt​​)Pt​1​​=1−Et​βλt​λt+1​​=1−Qt​

    可得货币的需求方程

    ∂u∂(M/P)(Ct,Nt,MtPt)∂u∂C(Ct,Nt,MtPt)=1−Qt\frac{\frac{\partial u}{\partial (M/P)}(C_t,N_t,\frac{M_t}{P_t})}{\frac{\partial u}{\partial C}(C_t,N_t,\frac{M_t}{P_t})}= 1-Q_t ∂C∂u​(Ct​,Nt​,Pt​Mt​​)∂(M/P)∂u​(Ct​,Nt​,Pt​Mt​​)​=1−Qt​

    （2） 令 u(C,N,MP)=C1−σ1−σ−αN1+ϕ1+ϕ+(M/P)1−σ1−σu(C,N,\frac MP)= \frac{C^{1-\sigma}}{1-\sigma}-\alpha \frac{N^{1+\phi}}{1+ \phi}+ \frac{(M/P)^{1-\sigma}}{1-\sigma}u(C,N,PM​)=1−σC1−σ​−α1+ϕN1+ϕ​+1−σ(M/P)1−σ​，求实际产出和货币供给、需求方程。

    解：

    代入之后，除去货币需求方程外均与 3 中相同，稳态下 C∗=Y∗=N∗=1C^* =Y^*= N^* =1C∗=Y∗=N∗=1，同时又货币供给、需求方程为

    MtPt=Ct(1−Qt)−1/σ\frac{M_t}{P_t}= C_t (1-Q_t)^{-1/\sigma} Pt​Mt​​=Ct​(1−Qt​)−1/σ

    从而有

    m^t−p^t=c^t−1σQ∗1−Q∗i^t\hat m_t -\hat p_t = \hat c_t -\frac1\sigma \frac{Q^*}{1-Q^*}\hat i_t m^t​−p^​t​=c^t​−σ1​1−Q∗Q∗​i^t​

    令 η=1σQ∗1−Q∗\eta = \frac{1}{\sigma}\frac{Q^*}{1-Q^*}η=σ1​1−Q∗Q∗​ 即与 3 中货币外生供给相同，又 Q∗=βQ^* = \betaQ∗=β，有

    η=β∗1−β∗1σ\eta = \frac{\beta ^*}{1-\beta^*}\frac1\sigma η=1−β∗β∗​σ1​

    (3) 若 u(Ct,Nt,MtPt)=[(1−θ)Ct1−r+θ(MtPt)1−r]1−σ1−r−ϕLNt1+ϕ1+ϕu(C_t,N_t,\frac{M_t}{P_t})=\left[(1-\theta)C_t^{1-r}+ \theta \left( \frac{M_t}{P_t}\right)^{1-r}\right]^{\frac{1-\sigma}{1-r}}-\phi_L \frac{N_t^{1+\phi}}{1+ \phi}u(Ct​,Nt​,Pt​Mt​​)=[(1−θ)Ct1−r​+θ(Pt​Mt​​)1−r]1−r1−σ​−ϕL​1+ϕNt1+ϕ​​，若 ϕL=α1−θ,θ=1−β2−β\phi_L=\frac{\alpha}{1-\theta},\theta=\frac{1-\beta}{2-\beta}ϕL​=1−θα​,θ=2−β1−β​，求稳态与对数线性化。

    作为一个不可分效用的MIU模型，有两点启示：

    1. RBC 模型未必是货币中性的，实际货币量 Mt/PtM_t/P_tMt​/Pt​ 对经济的配置亦有影响；从而用上述不可分情形分析货币政策的价格型和数量型议题是经典方案。
    2. RBC 模型中，价格水平的作用是中性的，这里若无货币的工序方程 LM 曲线，要素是由实际货币供给变动和技术冲击、需求冲击等引起变化的。

    # NK 基准模型

    居民

    Et∑k=0+∞βku(Ct+k,Nt+k)s.t.PtCt+Bt+1Qt=Bt+WtNt+Tt\begin{align*}& {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty}\beta^k u(C_{t+k},N_{t+k})\\ & \text{s.t.} \quad P_t C_t + B_{t+1}Q_t = B_t + W_t N_t + T_t \end{align*}​Et​k=0∑+∞​βku(Ct+k​,Nt+k​)s.t.Pt​Ct​+Bt+1​Qt​=Bt​+Wt​Nt​+Tt​​

    最终产品厂商

    Yt=[∫01yt(i)1−1εdi]ε/(ε−1)Y_t = \left[\int_0^1 y_t (i) ^{1-\frac1\varepsilon}di\right]^{\varepsilon/(\varepsilon-1)} Yt​=[∫01​yt​(i)1−ε1​di]ε/(ε−1)

    ΠtF=max⁡{yt(i)}i∈[0,1]PtYt−∫01pt(i)yt(i)di\Pi_t^F = \max_{\{y_t(i)\}_{i\in [0,1]}} P_t Y_t -\int_0^1 p_t(i)y_t(i) di ΠtF​={yt​(i)}i∈[0,1]​max​Pt​Yt​−∫01​pt​(i)yt​(i)di

    每个时刻有 (1−θ)(1-\theta)(1−θ) 的企业可调价，有 θ\thetaθ 的不可调价。

    （1） 写出居民和最终厂商的最终条件。

    解：

    见题 3 有居民的最终行为条件如下

    {Et∂u/∂C(Ct+1,Nt+1)∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)PtPt+11Qt=1−∂u/∂N(Ct,Nt)∂u/∂C(Ct,Nt)=WtPt\begin{cases}{\mathbb E}_t \frac{\partial u/\partial C(C_{t+1},N_{t+1})}{\partial u/\partial C(C_t,N_t)}\frac{P_t}{P_{t+1}}\frac1{Q_t}=1\\ -\frac{\partial u/\partial N(C_t,N_t)}{\partial u/\partial C(C_t,N_t)}= \frac{W_t}{P_t} \end{cases}{Et​∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)∂u/∂C(Ct+1​,Nt+1​)​Pt+1​Pt​​Qt​1​=1−∂u/∂C(Ct​,Nt​)∂u/∂N(Ct​,Nt​)​=Pt​Wt​​​

    最终企业的最终条件：见题 5

    ΠtF=max⁡{yt(i)}PtYt−∫01pt(i)yt(i)diYt=[∫01yt(i)1−1εdi]εε−1\begin{aligned} \Pi_{t}^{F}=\max _{\left\{y_{t}(i)\right\}} \quad & P_{t} Y_{t}-\int_{0}^{1} p_{t}(i) y_{t}(i) d i \\ & Y_{t} =\left[\int_{0}^{1} y_{t}(i)^{1- \frac{1}{\varepsilon}} d{i}\right]^{\frac{\varepsilon}{\varepsilon-1}} \end{aligned} ΠtF​={yt​(i)}max​​Pt​Yt​−∫01​pt​(i)yt​(i)diYt​=[∫01​yt​(i)1−ε1​di]ε−1ε​​

    FOC 可得

    εε−1[∫01yt(i)di]εε−1−1×Pt×(1−1ε)yt(i)−1ε=pt(i)⇒PtYt1εyt(i)−1ε=pt(i)⇒yt(i)Yt=(pt(i)Pt)−ε 又有 PtYt=∫01pt(i)yt(i)di=∫01pt(i)(pt(i)Pt)−εYtdi⇒Pt1−ε=∫01pt(i)1−εdi\frac{\varepsilon}{\varepsilon-1}\left[\int_{0}^{1} y_{t}(i) d i\right]^{\frac{\varepsilon}{\varepsilon-1}-1} \times P_{t} \times\left(1-\frac{1}{\varepsilon}\right) y_{t}(i)^{-\frac1\varepsilon}=p_{t}(i)\\ \Rightarrow P_{t} Y_{t}^{\frac{1}{\varepsilon}} y_{t}(i) ^{-\frac{1}{\varepsilon}}=p_{t}(i) \Rightarrow \frac{y_{t}(i)}{Y_{t}}=\left(\frac{p_{t}(i)}{P_{t}}\right)^{-\varepsilon}\\ \text { 又有 } P_{t} Y_{t}=\int_{0}^{1} p_{t}(i) y_{t}(i) d{i}=\int_{0}^{1} p_{t}(i)\left(\frac{p_{t}(i)}{P_{t}}\right)^{-\varepsilon} Y_{t} d{i}\\ \Rightarrow \quad P_{t}^{1-\varepsilon}=\int_{0}^{1} p_{t}(i)^{1-\varepsilon} d i ε−1ε​[∫01​yt​(i)di]ε−1ε​−1×Pt​×(1−ε1​)yt​(i)−ε1​=pt​(i)⇒Pt​Ytε1​​yt​(i)−ε1​=pt​(i)⇒Yt​yt​(i)​=(Pt​pt​(i)​)−ε又有Pt​Yt​=∫01​pt​(i)yt​(i)di=∫01​pt​(i)(Pt​pt​(i)​)−εYt​di⇒Pt1−ε​=∫01​pt​(i)1−εdi

    从而可得

    yt(i)=(pt(i)/Pt)−εYty_t(i) = (p_t(i)/P_t)^{-\varepsilon}Y_t yt​(i)=(pt​(i)/Pt​)−εYt​

    Pt=[∫01pt(i)1−εdi]1/(1−ε)P_t = \left[\int_0^1 p_t(i)^{1-\varepsilon}di\right]^{1/(1-\varepsilon)} Pt​=[∫01​pt​(i)1−εdi]1/(1−ε)

    （2） 当 u(C,N)=C1−σ1−σ−αN1+ϕ1+ϕu(C,N)= \frac{C^{1-\sigma}}{1-\sigma}-\alpha \frac{N^{1+\phi}}{1+ \phi}u(C,N)=1−σC1−σ​−α1+ϕN1+ϕ​，yt(i)=Atnt(i)αy_t(i) = A_t n_t(i)^\alphayt​(i)=At​nt​(i)α时，写出在时刻 t 可以调价的企业的最大化目标和最终条件。

    解：

    TCt+k(pt∗(i))≜[(pt∗(i)/Pt+k)−εYt+kAt+k]1/αWt+kTC_{t+k} (p_t^*(i))\triangleq \left[\frac{(p^*_t(i)/P_{t+k})^{-\varepsilon}Y_{t+k}}{A_{t+k}}\right]^{1/\alpha}W_{t+k} TCt+k​(pt∗​(i))≜[At+k​(pt∗​(i)/Pt+k​)−εYt+k​​]1/αWt+k​

    Mt,t+kN=βk(Ct+kCt)−σPtPt+kM_{t,t+k}^N = \beta^k \left(\frac{C_{t+k}}{C_t} \right)^{-\sigma} \frac{P_t}{P_{t+k}} Mt,t+kN​=βk(Ct​Ct+k​​)−σPt+k​Pt​​

    企业的最大化目标

    max⁡pt∗(i)Et∑k=0+∞θkMt,t+kN[(pt∗(i)Pt+k)1−εPt+kYt+k−TCt+k(pt∗(i))]\max _{p_t^*(i)} \quad {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} \theta^kM_{t,t+k}^N \left[\left( \frac{p_t^*(i)}{P_{t+k}}\right)^{1-\varepsilon}P_{t+k}Y_{t+k} - TC_{t+k}(p_t^*(i))\right] pt∗​(i)max​Et​k=0∑+∞​θkMt,t+kN​[(Pt+k​pt∗​(i)​)1−εPt+k​Yt+k​−TCt+k​(pt∗​(i))]

    最终表示如下

    {Et∑k=0+∞θkMt,t+kNPt+kεYt+kpt∗(i)−ε}pt∗(i)\left\{{\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} \theta^k M_{t,t+k}^N P_{t+k}^\varepsilon Y_{t+k}p_t^*(i)^{-\varepsilon}\right\}p_t^*(i) {Et​k=0∑+∞​θkMt,t+kN​Pt+kε​Yt+k​pt∗​(i)−ε}pt∗​(i)

    =1αεε−1∑k=0+∞θkMt,t+kNWt+k[(pt∗(i)/Pt+k)−εYt+kAt+k]1/α= \frac1\alpha\frac\varepsilon{\varepsilon-1} \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} \theta^k M_{t,t+k}^NW_{t+k}\left[\frac{(p_t^*(i)/P_{t+k})^{-\varepsilon}Y_{t+k}}{A_{t+k}}\right]^{1/\alpha} =α1​ε−1ε​k=0∑+∞​θkMt,t+kN​Wt+k​[At+k​(pt∗​(i)/Pt+k​)−εYt+k​​]1/α

    由求解可知，pt∗(i)p_t^*(i)pt∗​(i) 对 ∀i\forall i∀i 可调价均相同，后面记为 pt∗p_t^*pt∗​。

    记 TCt+k(pt∗)=TCt+k(yt+k∣t(pt∗)TC_{t+k}(p_t^*)= TC_{t+k} (y_{t+k|t}(p_t^*)TCt+k​(pt∗​)=TCt+k​(yt+k∣t​(pt∗​)，可得

    dTCt+kdpt∗=dTCt+kdyt+k∣tdyt+k∣tdpt∗\frac{d TC_{t+k}}{d p_t^*}= \frac{d TC_{t+k}}{d y_{t+k|t}}\frac{d y_{t+k|t}}{d p_t^*} dpt∗​dTCt+k​​=dyt+k∣t​dTCt+k​​dpt∗​dyt+k∣t​​

    MCt+k∣tN≜∂TCt+k∂yt+k∣tMC_{t+k|t}^N \triangleq \frac{\partial TC_{t+k}}{\partial y_{t+k|t}} MCt+k∣tN​≜∂yt+k∣t​∂TCt+k​​

    因

    yt+k∣t=Pt+kεYt+kpt∗−εy_{t+k|t} = P_{t+k}^\varepsilon Y_{t+k}{p_t^*}^{-\varepsilon} yt+k∣t​=Pt+kε​Yt+k​pt∗​−ε

    有

    MCt+k∣tN=Wt+k1α(yt+k∣tAt+k)1/α−11At+kMC_{t+k|t}^N = W_{t+k}\frac1\alpha (\frac{y_{t+k|t}}{A_{t+k}})^{1/\alpha-1}\frac1{A_{t+k}} MCt+k∣tN​=Wt+k​α1​(At+k​yt+k∣t​​)1/α−1At+k​1​

    上述表示可写为

    (Et∑k=0+∞θkMt,t+kNyt+k∣t)pt∗(i)=εε−1Et∑k=0+∞θkMt,t+kNyt+k∣tMCt+k∣tN\left({\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty}\theta^k M_{t,t+k}^N y_{t+ k|t} \right)p_t^*(i)= \frac{\varepsilon}{\varepsilon-1}{\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} \theta^k M_{t,t+k}^N y_{t+k|t} MC_{t+k|t}^N (Et​k=0∑+∞​θkMt,t+kN​yt+k∣t​)pt∗​(i)=ε−1ε​Et​k=0∑+∞​θkMt,t+kN​yt+k∣t​MCt+k∣tN​

    （3） 因为 Nt=∫01nt(i)diN_t = \int_0^1 n_t(i)diNt​=∫01​nt​(i)di，写出此时的劳动需求方程。

    解：

    yt(i)=(pt(i)Pt)−εYty_t(i) = \left( \frac{p_t(i)}{P_t}\right)^{-\varepsilon} Y_t yt​(i)=(Pt​pt​(i)​)−εYt​

    nt(i)=(yt(i)At)1/αn_t(i)= \left(\frac{y_t(i)}{A_t}\right)^{1/\alpha} nt​(i)=(At​yt​(i)​)1/α

    nt(i)=pt(i)−ε/αPt−ε/α(YtAt)1/αn_t(i) = \frac{p_t(i)^{-\varepsilon/\alpha}}{P_t^{-\varepsilon/\alpha}}\left(\frac{Y_t}{A_t} \right)^{1/\alpha} nt​(i)=Pt−ε/α​pt​(i)−ε/α​(At​Yt​​)1/α

    Nt=∫01nt(i)di=∫01pt(i)−ε/αPt−ε/αdi×(YtAt)1/αN_t = \int_0^1 n_t(i)di= \int _0^1 \frac{p_t(i)^{-\varepsilon/\alpha}}{P_t^{-\varepsilon/\alpha}}di \times \left( \frac{Y_t}{A_t}\right)^{1/\alpha} Nt​=∫01​nt​(i)di=∫01​Pt−ε/α​pt​(i)−ε/α​di×(At​Yt​​)1/α

    （4） 已知 ln⁡At+1=ρln⁡At+εt+1A\ln A_{t+1} = \rho \ln A_t + \varepsilon_{t+1}^AlnAt+1​=ρlnAt​+εt+1A​。写出上述问题下的市场出清条件，并给出当 Pt+1=Pt=1P_{t+1}=P_t =1Pt+1​=Pt​=1，At+1=At=1A_{t+1}=A_t=1At+1​=At​=1，且无垄断时的稳态解。

    解：

    居民的劳动供给

    αCtσNtϕ=WtPt(1)\alpha C_t ^\sigma N_t^\phi = \frac{W_t}{P_t}\tag1 αCtσ​Ntϕ​=Pt​Wt​​(1)

    居民的跨期行为

    Etβ(Ct+1Ct)−σPtPt+11Qt=1(2){\mathbb E}_t \beta \left( \frac{C_{t+1}}{C_t}\right)^{-\sigma} \frac{P_t}{P_{t+1}}\frac1{Q_t} = 1\tag2 Et​β(Ct​Ct+1​​)−σPt+1​Pt​​Qt​1​=1(2)

    最终产品定价

    Pt1−ε=∫01pt(i)1−εdi=θPt−11−ε+(1−θ)Pt∗1−ε(3)P_t ^{1-\varepsilon}= \int_0^1 p_t(i)^{1-\varepsilon}di = \theta P_{t-1}^{1-\varepsilon} + (1-\theta){P_t^*}^{1-\varepsilon}\tag3 Pt1−ε​=∫01​pt​(i)1−εdi=θPt−11−ε​+(1−θ)Pt∗​1−ε(3)

    市场出清

    Yt=Ct=AtNtαdt(4)Y_t = C_t = \frac{A_tN_t^\alpha}{d_t}\tag4 Yt​=Ct​=dt​At​Ntα​​(4)

    扭曲定义

    dt=[∫01(pt(i)Pt)−ε/αdi]α(5)d_t = \left[\int _0^1 \left( \frac{p_t(i)}{P_t}\right)^{-\varepsilon/\alpha}di\right]^{\alpha}\tag5 dt​=[∫01​(Pt​pt​(i)​)−ε/αdi]α(5)

    最优定价行为

    Pt∗Et∑k=0+∞(θβ)k(Ct+kCt)−σPtPt+kyt+k∣t=εε−1Et∑k=0+∞(θβ)k(Ct+kCt)−σPtPt+kyt+k∣tMPt+k∣tN(6)P_t^*{\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty}(\theta\beta)^k \left(\frac{C_{t+k}}{C_t} \right)^{-\sigma}\frac{P_t}{P_{t+k}}y_{t+k|t}= \frac{\varepsilon}{\varepsilon-1}{\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} (\theta\beta)^k \left(\frac{C_{t+k}}{C_t} \right)^{-\sigma}\frac{P_t}{P_{t+k}}y_{t+k|t} MP_{t+k|t}^N\tag6 Pt∗​Et​k=0∑+∞​(θβ)k(Ct​Ct+k​​)−σPt+k​Pt​​yt+k∣t​=ε−1ε​Et​k=0∑+∞​(θβ)k(Ct​Ct+k​​)−σPt+k​Pt​​yt+k∣t​MPt+k∣tN​(6)

    定义产出

    yt+k∣t=(Pt∗Pt+k)−εYt+k(7)y_{t+k|t} = \left(\frac{P_t^*}{P_{t+k}} \right)^{-\varepsilon}Y_{t+k}\tag7 yt+k∣t​=(Pt+k​Pt∗​​)−εYt+k​(7)

    定义名义成本

    MCt+k∣tN=Wt+k1α(yt+k∣tAt+k)1/α−11At+k(8)MC_{t+k|t}^N = W_{t+k}\frac1\alpha (\frac{y_{t+k|t}}{A_{t+k}})^{1/\alpha-1}\frac1{A_{t+k}}\tag8 MCt+k∣tN​=Wt+k​α1​(At+k​yt+k∣t​​)1/α−1At+k​1​(8)

    泰勒规则

    略给定

    冲击设定

    ln⁡At+1=ρAln⁡At+εt+1A\ln A_{t+1} = \rho _A \ln A_t + \varepsilon_{t+1}^A lnAt+1​=ρA​lnAt​+εt+1A​

    ln⁡At≡0\ln A_t\equiv 0lnAt​≡0，Pt+1≡1P_{t+1}\equiv1Pt+1​≡1 时可得稳态

    C∗=Y∗=d∗=P∗=pt∗(i)=Pt∗=1C^*= Y^*=d^*= P^* = p_t^*(i)=P_t^* =1 C∗=Y∗=d∗=P∗=pt∗​(i)=Pt∗​=1

    W∗=αW^*= \alpha W∗=α

    Q∗=βQ^* = \beta Q∗=β

    （5） 对 dtd_tdt​ 对数线性化，并结合 (4) 和 (2) 获得 I-S 曲线。

    解：

    p^t=∫01(Pt∗(i)P∗)1−εp^t(i)di=∫01p^t(i)di\hat p_t = \int_0^1 \left( \frac{P_t^*(i)}{P^*}\right)^{1-\varepsilon} \hat p_t(i) di = \int_0^1 \hat p_t(i) di p^​t​=∫01​(P∗Pt∗​(i)​)1−εp^​t​(i)di=∫01​p^​t​(i)di

    dt=[∫01(pt(i)Pt)−ε/αdi]αd_t = \left[\int _0^1 \left( \frac{p_t(i)}{P_t}\right)^{-\varepsilon/\alpha}di\right]^{\alpha} dt​=[∫01​(Pt​pt​(i)​)−ε/αdi]α

    d^t=−εd∗(∫01p^t(i)di−P^t)=0\hat d_t = -\frac{\varepsilon}{d^*} \left(\int_0^1 \hat p_t(i)di-\hat P_t \right)=0 d^t​=−d∗ε​(∫01​p^​t​(i)di−P^t​)=0

    将 y^t=c^t\hat y_t = \hat c_ty^​t​=c^t​ 代入 (2) 可以获得

    Ety^t+1−(i^t−Etπ^t+1)1σ=y^t{\mathbb E}_t \hat y_{t+1} -(\hat i_t - {\mathbb E}_t \hat \pi_{t+1})\frac1\sigma = \hat y_t Et​y^​t+1​−(i^t​−Et​π^t+1​)σ1​=y^​t​

    y~t≜y^t−y^tn\tilde y_t \triangleq \hat y_t -\hat y_t ^n y~​t​≜y^​t​−y^​tn​

    又因 y^t=ρya^t\hat y_t = \rho_y\hat a_ty^​t​=ρy​a^t​，而 r^tn=σρy[Eta^t+1−a^t]\hat r_t^n = \sigma \rho_y [{\mathbb E}_t \hat a_{t+1}-\hat a_t]r^tn​=σρy​[Et​a^t+1​−a^t​] 代入之后可得 I-S 曲线

    y~t=Ety~t+1−1σ(i^t−Etπ^t+1−r^tn)\tilde y_t = {\mathbb E}_t \tilde y_{t+1} -\frac1\sigma(\hat i_t -{\mathbb E}_t \hat \pi_{t+1}-\hat r_t^n) y~​t​=Et​y~​t+1​−σ1​(i^t​−Et​π^t+1​−r^tn​)

    （6） 定义 MCt+k∣tN/Pt+k=MCt+k∣tMC_{t+k|t}^N/P_{t+k} = MC_{t+k|t}MCt+k∣tN​/Pt+k​=MCt+k∣t​，用 mc^t+k∣t\widehat {mc}_{t+k|t}mct+k∣t​ 与 p^t+k−p^t−1\hat p_{t+k}- \hat p_{t-1}p^​t+k​−p^​t−1​ 表示 p^t∗−p^t−1\hat p_t^* -\hat p_{t-1}p^​t∗​−p^​t−1​。

    解：

    对于 (6)，可以获得

    Et∑k=0+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)(−σc^t+k+σc^t+p^t−p^t+k+y^t+k∣t+p^t∗=Et∑k=0+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)(−σc^t+k+σc^t+p^t−p^t+k+y^t+k∣t+mc^t+k∣tN)\begin{align*}& {\mathbb E_t} \sum_{k=0}^{+ \infty} (\theta \beta)^k (1-\theta\beta) (-\sigma\hat c_{t+k} +\sigma \hat c_t + \hat p_t-\hat p_{t+k} + \hat y_{t+k|t}+\hat p_t^*\\ = & {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} (\theta\beta)^k (1-\theta\beta) (-\sigma \hat c_{t+k} + \sigma \hat c_t + \hat p_t -\hat p_{t+k} + \hat y_{t+k|t} + \widehat {mc}_{t+k|t}^N) \end{align*}=​Et​k=0∑+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)(−σc^t+k​+σc^t​+p^​t​−p^​t+k​+y^​t+k∣t​+p^​t∗​Et​k=0∑+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)(−σc^t+k​+σc^t​+p^​t​−p^​t+k​+y^​t+k∣t​+mct+k∣tN​)​

    可得

    p^t∗=Et∑k=0+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)(mc^t+k∣tN)\hat p_t^* = {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} (\theta\beta)^k(1-\theta\beta)(\widehat {mc}_{t+k|t}^N) p^​t∗​=Et​k=0∑+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)(mct+k∣tN​)

    p^t∗−p^t−1=Et∑k=0+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)(mc^t+k∣t)+Et∑k=0+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)(p^t+k−p^t−1)\hat p_t^* -\hat p_{t-1} = {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+ \infty} (\theta\beta)^k (1-\theta\beta)(\widehat{mc}_{t+k|t} ) + {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} (\theta\beta)^k (1-\theta\beta) (\hat p_{t+k}-\hat p_{t-1}) p^​t∗​−p^​t−1​=Et​k=0∑+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)(mct+k∣t​)+Et​k=0∑+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)(p^​t+k​−p^​t−1​)

    （7） 因为 MCt+k∣t=(Pt∗Pt+k)−(1−α)εαMCt+kMC_{t+k|t}= \left( \frac{P_t^*}{P_{t+k}}\right)^{-\frac{(1-\alpha)\varepsilon}{\alpha}}MC_{t+k} MCt+k∣t​=(Pt+k​Pt∗​​)−α(1−α)ε​MCt+k​，将上式结合 Pt1−ε=(1−θ)(Pt∗)1−ε+θPt−11−εP_t^{1-\varepsilon}= (1-\theta)(P_t^*)^{1-\varepsilon}+ \theta P_{t-1}^{1-\varepsilon}Pt1−ε​=(1−θ)(Pt∗​)1−ε+θPt−11−ε​ 获得通胀与物价的关系。

    解：

    Pt1−ε=(1−θ)(Pt∗)1−ε+θPt−11−ε⇒(1−ε)p^t=[(1−θ)p^t∗+θp^t−1](1−ε)⇒p^t−p^t−1=(1−θ)(p^t∗−p^t−1)⇒p^t∗−p^t−1=11−θ(p^t−p^t−1)\begin{align*} & P_t^{1-\varepsilon}= (1-\theta) (P_t^*)^{1-\varepsilon}+ \theta P_{t-1}^{1-\varepsilon}\\ \Rightarrow \quad & (1-\varepsilon)\hat p_t = \left[(1-\theta)\hat p_t^* + \theta \hat p_{t-1}\right](1-\varepsilon)\\ \Rightarrow \quad & \hat p_t -\hat p_{t-1} = (1-\theta)(\hat p_t^* -\hat p_{t-1})\\ \Rightarrow \quad & \hat p_t^* -\hat p_{t-1} = \frac1{1-\theta}(\hat p_t - \hat p_{t-1}) \end{align*}⇒⇒⇒​Pt1−ε​=(1−θ)(Pt∗​)1−ε+θPt−11−ε​(1−ε)p^​t​=[(1−θ)p^​t∗​+θp^​t−1​](1−ε)p^​t​−p^​t−1​=(1−θ)(p^​t∗​−p^​t−1​)p^​t∗​−p^​t−1​=1−θ1​(p^​t​−p^​t−1​)​

    而

    mc^t+k∣t=mc^t+k−(1−α)εα(p^t∗−p^t+k)\widehat {mc} _{t+k|t} = \widehat {mc} _ {t+k} - \frac{(1-\alpha)\varepsilon}{\alpha} (\hat p_t^* -\hat p_{t+k}) mct+k∣t​=mct+k​−α(1−α)ε​(p^​t∗​−p^​t+k​)

    MCt+k∣t=Wt+kPt+k(Pt∗(i)−εPt+kεYt+kAt+k)1/α−11α1At+k=1At+kWt+kPt+k(Yt+kAt+k)1/α−11α⏟MCt+k[pt∗(i)Pt+k]−ε(1/α−1)MC_{t+k|t} = \frac{W_{t+k}}{P_{t+k}}\left( \frac{P_t^*(i)^{-\varepsilon}P_{t+k}^\varepsilon Y_{t+k}}{A_{t+k}}\right)^{1/\alpha-1}\frac1\alpha \frac 1{A_{t+k}}\\ = \underbrace{\frac1{A_{t+k}}\frac{W_{t+k}}{P_{t+k}}\left( \frac{Y_{t+k}}{A_{t+k}}\right)^{1/\alpha -1 }\frac1\alpha}_{MC_{t+k}} \left[\frac{p_t^*(i)}{P_{t+k}}\right]^{-\varepsilon(1/\alpha-1)}MCt+k∣t​=Pt+k​Wt+k​​(At+k​Pt∗​(i)−εPt+kε​Yt+k​​)1/α−1α1​At+k​1​=MCt+k​At+k​1​Pt+k​Wt+k​​(At+k​Yt+k​​)1/α−1α1​​​[Pt+k​pt∗​(i)​]−ε(1/α−1)

    可得

    mc^t+k∣t=mc^t+k−(1−α)εα(p^t∗−p^t+k)=mc^t+k−(1−α)εα(p^t∗−p^t−1)+(1−α)εα(p^t+k−p^t−1)\widehat {mc}_{t+k|t} = \widehat {mc}_{t+k} - \frac{(1-\alpha)\varepsilon}{\alpha}(\hat p_t^* -\hat p_{t+k})\\ = \widehat{mc}_{t+k} -\frac{(1-\alpha)\varepsilon}{\alpha}(\hat p_t^* -\hat p_{t-1})+ \frac{(1-\alpha)\varepsilon}{\alpha}(\hat p_{t+k}-\hat p_{t-1})mct+k∣t​=mct+k​−α(1−α)ε​(p^​t∗​−p^​t+k​)=mct+k​−α(1−α)ε​(p^​t∗​−p^​t−1​)+α(1−α)ε​(p^​t+k​−p^​t−1​)

    代入 p^t∗−p^t−1=Et∑k=0+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)(mc^t+k∣t)+Et∑k=0+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)(p^t+k−p^t−1)\hat p_t^* -\hat p_{t-1} = {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+ \infty} (\theta\beta)^k (1-\theta\beta)(\widehat{mc}_{t+k|t} ) + {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} (\theta\beta)^k (1-\theta\beta) (\hat p_{t+k}-\hat p_{t-1})p^​t∗​−p^​t−1​=Et​∑k=0+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)(mct+k∣t​)+Et​∑k=0+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)(p^​t+k​−p^​t−1​) 可得

    p^t∗−p^t−1=Et∑k=0+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)mc^t+k−(1−α)εα(p^t∗−p^t−1)+Et∑k=0+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)[1+(1−α)εα](p^t+k−p^t−1)\hat p_t^* - \hat p_{t-1} = {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} (\theta\beta)^k (1-\theta\beta) \widehat{mc}_{t+k} - \frac{(1-\alpha)\varepsilon}{\alpha}(\hat p_t^* - \hat p_{t-1}) + {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} (\theta\beta)^k (1-\theta\beta)\left[1+\frac{(1-\alpha)\varepsilon}{\alpha}\right](\hat p_{t+k}-\hat p_{t-1}) p^​t∗​−p^​t−1​=Et​k=0∑+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)mct+k​−α(1−α)ε​(p^​t∗​−p^​t−1​)+Et​k=0∑+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)[1+α(1−α)ε​](p^​t+k​−p^​t−1​)

    令 Θ=αα+(1−α)ε≤1\Theta = \frac\alpha{\alpha+ (1-\alpha)\varepsilon}\leq1Θ=α+(1−α)εα​≤1，可得

    p^t∗−p^t−1=Et∑k=0+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)mc^t+kΘ+Et∑k=0+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)(p^t+k−p^t−1)\hat p_t^* - \hat p_{t-1} = {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} (\theta\beta)^k (1-\theta\beta)\widehat{mc}_{t+k} \Theta + {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} (\theta\beta)^k (1-\theta\beta)(\hat p_{t+k}-\hat p_{t-1}) p^​t∗​−p^​t−1​=Et​k=0∑+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)mct+k​Θ+Et​k=0∑+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)(p^​t+k​−p^​t−1​)

    有

    p^t+1∗−p^t=Et+1∑k=0+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)mc^t+1+kΘ+Et+1∑k=0+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)(p^t+k+1−p^t)\hat p_{t+1}^* - \hat p_{t} = {\mathbb E}_{t+1} \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} (\theta\beta)^k (1-\theta\beta)\widehat{mc}_{t+1+k} \Theta + {\mathbb E}_{t+1} \sum_{k=0}^{+\infty} (\theta\beta)^k (1-\theta\beta)(\hat p_{t+k+1}-\hat p_{t}) p^​t+1∗​−p^​t​=Et+1​k=0∑+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)mct+1+k​Θ+Et+1​k=0∑+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)(p^​t+k+1​−p^​t​)

    Et(p^t+1∗−p^t)θβ=Et∑k=1+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)Θmc^t+k+Et∑k=1+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)(p^t+k−p^t){\mathbb E}_t (\hat p_{t+1}^* -\hat p_t) \theta \beta = {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=1}^{+\infty} (\theta\beta)^k (1-\theta \beta)\Theta \widehat {mc}_{t+k} + {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=1}^{+\infty} (\theta\beta)^k (1-\theta \beta)(\hat p_{t+k}-\hat p_t) Et​(p^​t+1∗​−p^​t​)θβ=Et​k=1∑+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)Θmct+k​+Et​k=1∑+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)(p^​t+k​−p^​t​)

    又因为

    p^t∗−p^t−1=(1−θβ)Θmc^t+(1−θβ)(p^t−p^t−1)+Et∑k=1+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)Θmc^t+k+Et∑k=1+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)(p^t+k−p^t−1)=(1−θβ)Θmc^+(p^t−p^t−1)+Et∑k=1+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)Θmc^t+k+Et∑k=1+∞(θβ)k(1−θβ)(p^t+k−p^t)\hat p_t^* - \hat p_{t-1} = (1-\theta\beta) \Theta \widehat{mc}_t + (1-\theta\beta)(\hat p_t-\hat p_{t-1}) + {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=1}^{+\infty} (\theta\beta)^k (1-\theta\beta)\Theta \widehat {mc}_{t+k}+ {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=1}^{+ \infty} (\theta\beta)^k (1-\theta\beta)(\hat p_{t+k}-\hat p_{t-1})\\ =(1-\theta\beta)\Theta \widehat {mc} + (\hat p_t -\hat p_{t-1}) + {\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=1}^{+\infty} (\theta\beta)^k (1-\theta\beta)\Theta \widehat{mc}_{t+k}+{\mathbb E}_t \sum_{k=1}^{+\infty} (\theta\beta)^k (1-\theta\beta)(\hat p_{t+k}-\hat p_t)p^​t∗​−p^​t−1​=(1−θβ)Θmct​+(1−θβ)(p^​t​−p^​t−1​)+Et​k=1∑+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)Θmct+k​+Et​k=1∑+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)(p^​t+k​−p^​t−1​)=(1−θβ)Θmc+(p^​t​−p^​t−1​)+Et​k=1∑+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)Θmct+k​+Et​k=1∑+∞​(θβ)k(1−θβ)(p^​t+k​−p^​t​)

    从而有

    p^t∗−p^t−1=(1−θβ)Θmc^+(p^t−p^t−1)+Etθβ(p^t+1∗−p^t)\hat p_t^* - \hat p_{t-1} = (1-\theta\beta)\Theta \widehat{mc} + (\hat p_t- \hat p_{t-1}) + {\mathbb E}_t \theta \beta(\hat p_{t+1}^*-\hat p_t) p^​t∗​−p^​t−1​=(1−θβ)Θmc+(p^​t​−p^​t−1​)+Et​θβ(p^​t+1∗​−p^​t​)

    有

    p^t∗−p^t−1=θβEt(p^t+1∗−p^t)+π^t+(1−θβ)Θmc^t\hat p_t^* -\hat p_{t-1} = \theta \beta{\mathbb E}_t (\hat p_{t+1}^* -\hat p_t ) + \hat \pi_t + (1-\theta\beta)\Theta \widehat{mc}_t p^​t∗​−p^​t−1​=θβEt​(p^​t+1∗​−p^​t​)+π^t​+(1−θβ)Θmct​

    又因为

    p^t∗−p^t−1=11−θ(p^t−p^t−1)=11−θπ^t\hat p_t^* -\hat p_{t-1} = \frac{1}{1-\theta}(\hat p_t-\hat p_{t-1}) = \frac1{1-\theta}\hat \pi_t p^​t∗​−p^​t−1​=1−θ1​(p^​t​−p^​t−1​)=1−θ1​π^t​

    11−θπ^t=θβEtπ^t+111−θ+π^t+(1−θβ)Θmc^t\frac{1}{1-\theta}\hat \pi_t = \theta \beta{\mathbb E}_t \hat \pi_{t+1} \frac1{1-\theta} + \hat \pi_t + (1-\theta\beta)\Theta \widehat{mc}_t 1−θ1​π^t​=θβEt​π^t+1​1−θ1​+π^t​+(1−θβ)Θmct​

    θ1−θπ^t=θ1−θβEtπ^t+1+(1−θβ)Θmc^t\frac{\theta}{1-\theta}\hat \pi_t = \frac{\theta}{1-\theta}\beta{\mathbb E}_t \hat \pi_{t+1} + (1-\theta\beta) \Theta \widehat{mc}_t 1−θθ​π^t​=1−θθ​βEt​π^t+1​+(1−θβ)Θmct​

    π^t=βEtπ^t+1+(1−θβ)Θ(1−θ)θmc^t\hat \pi_t = \beta {\mathbb E}_t \hat \pi_{t+1} + \frac{(1-\theta\beta)\Theta (1-\theta)}{\theta}\widehat{mc}_t π^t​=βEt​π^t+1​+θ(1−θβ)Θ(1−θ)​mct​

    令 λ≜(1−θβ)Θ(1−θ)θ\lambda\triangleq \frac{(1-\theta\beta)\Theta(1-\theta)}{\theta}λ≜θ(1−θβ)Θ(1−θ)​ 可得

    πt=βEtπ^t+1+λmc^t\pi_t = \beta {\mathbb E}_t \hat \pi_{t+1} + \lambda \widehat{mc}_t πt​=βEt​π^t+1​+λmct​

    （8） 因 Yt=AtNtα/dtY_t = A_tN_t^\alpha /d_tYt​=At​Ntα​/dt​，且 MCt=WtPt∂Nt∂Yt=1αWtPt(dtYtAt)1/α−1dtAtMC_t = \frac{W_t}{P_t}\frac{\partial N_t}{\partial Y_t}=\frac1\alpha \frac{W_t}{P_t}\left( \frac{d_tY_t}{A_t}\right)^{1/\alpha-1}\frac{d_t}{A_t}MCt​=Pt​Wt​​∂Yt​∂Nt​​=α1​Pt​Wt​​(At​dt​Yt​​)1/α−1At​dt​​，结合 ε−1εαNtϕCtσ=Wt/Pt\frac{\varepsilon-1}{\varepsilon}\alpha N_t^\phi C_t^\sigma = W_t/P_tεε−1​αNtϕ​Ctσ​=Wt​/Pt​，分析上述方程。

    解：

    因

    mc^t=w^t−p^t+(1α−1)(y^t−a^t+d^t)+d^t−a^t\widehat{mc}_t = \hat w_t -\hat p_t + \left(\frac1\alpha -1 \right)(\hat y_t -\hat a_t + \hat d_t)_+ \hat d_t -\hat a_t mct​=w^t​−p^​t​+(α1​−1)(y^​t​−a^t​+d^t​)+​d^t​−a^t​

    d^t=0\hat d_t= 0 d^t​=0

    可得

    {mc^t=w^t−p^t−(1−1α)(y^t−a^t)−a^ty^t=a^t+αn^t=c^tw^t−p^t=ϕn^t+σc^t\begin{cases} \widehat{mc}_t = \hat w_t -\hat p_t -\left( 1-\frac1\alpha\right)(\hat y_t -\hat a_t)-\hat a_t\\ \hat y_t = \hat a_t + \alpha \hat n_t = \hat c_t\\ \hat w_t -\hat p_t = \phi \hat n_t + \sigma \hat c_t \end{cases}⎩⎨⎧​mct​=w^t​−p^​t​−(1−α1​)(y^​t​−a^t​)−a^t​y^​t​=a^t​+αn^t​=c^t​w^t​−p^​t​=ϕn^t​+σc^t​​

    可得

    mc^t=(w^t−p^t)−(1−1α)(y^t−a^t)−a^t=ϕn^t+σc^t−(1−1α)(y^t−a^t)−a^t=ϕα(y^t−a^t)+σy^t−(1−1α)(y^t−a^t)−a^t=(σ+ϕ+1−αα)y^t−(ϕ+1α)at^\begin{aligned} \widehat{mc}_{t} &=\left(\hat{w}_{t}-\hat{p}_{t}\right)-\left(1-\frac{1}{\alpha}\right)\left(\hat{y}_{t}-\hat{a}_{t}\right)-\hat{a}_{t} \\ &=\phi \hat{n}_{t}+\sigma \hat{c}_{t}-\left(1-\frac{1}{\alpha}\right)\left(\hat{y}_{t}-\hat{a}_{t}\right)-\hat{a}_{t} \\ &=\frac{\phi}{\alpha}\left(\hat{y}_{t}-\hat{a}_{t}\right)+\sigma \hat{y}_{t}-\left(1-\frac{1}{\alpha}\right)\left(\hat{y}_{t}-\hat{a}_{t}\right)-\hat{a}_{t} \\ &=\left(\sigma +\frac{\phi+1-\alpha}{\alpha}\right) \hat{y}_{t}-\left(\frac{\phi+1}{\alpha}\right) \hat{a_{t}} \end{aligned}mct​​=(w^t​−p^​t​)−(1−α1​)(y^​t​−a^t​)−a^t​=ϕn^t​+σc^t​−(1−α1​)(y^​t​−a^t​)−a^t​=αϕ​(y^​t​−a^t​)+σy^​t​−(1−α1​)(y^​t​−a^t​)−a^t​=(σ+αϕ+1−α​)y^​t​−(αϕ+1​)at​^​​

    又因为

    ϕ+1αa^t=(σ+ϕ+1−αα)y^tn\frac{\phi +1}\alpha \hat a_t = \left( \sigma + \frac{\phi + 1-\alpha}{\alpha}\right)\hat y_t^n αϕ+1​a^t​=(σ+αϕ+1−α​)y^​tn​

    ρm≜σ+ϕ+1−αα\rho_m \triangleq \sigma + \frac{\phi + 1-\alpha}{\alpha} ρm​≜σ+αϕ+1−α​

    mc^t=ρm(y^t−y^tn)\widehat{mc}_t = \rho _m (\hat y_t -\hat y_t^n) mct​=ρm​(y^​t​−y^​tn​)

    从而可得菲利普斯曲线

    π^t=βEtπ^t+1+λmc^t=βEtπ^t+1+λρm⏟≜κ(y^t−y^tn)⏟≜y~t\hat \pi_t = \beta {\mathbb E}_t \hat \pi_{t+1} + \lambda \widehat{mc}_t = \beta {\mathbb E}_t \hat \pi_{t+1} + \underbrace{\lambda\rho_m}_{\triangleq \kappa}\underbrace{(\hat y_t -\hat y_t ^n)}_{\triangleq \tilde y_t} π^t​=βEt​π^t+1​+λmct​=βEt​π^t+1​+≜κλρm​​​≜y~​t​(y^​t​−y^​tn​)​​

    从而可得 I-S 曲线

    y~t=Ety~t+1−1σ(i^t−Etπ^t+1−r^tn)\tilde y_t = {\mathbb E}_t \tilde y_{t+1} -\frac1\sigma (\hat i_t-{\mathbb E}_t \hat \pi_{t+1}-\hat r_t^n) y~​t​=Et​y~​t+1​−σ1​(i^t​−Et​π^t+1​−r^tn​)

    P-C 曲线

    π^t=βEtπ^t+1+κy~t\hat \pi_t = \beta {\mathbb E}_t \hat \pi_{t+1} + \kappa\tilde y_t π^t​=βEt​π^t+1​+κy~​t​

    LM 曲线用 Taylor 规则替代

    基本型

    i^t=ϕππ^t+ϕyy~t\hat i_t = \phi _\pi \hat \pi_t + \phi _y \tilde y_t i^t​=ϕπ​π^t​+ϕy​y~​t​

    前瞻型

    i^t=ϕπFEtπ^t+1+ϕyFEty~t+1\hat i_t = \phi_\pi^F {\mathbb E}_t\hat \pi_{t+1}+ \phi _y^F {\mathbb E}_t\tilde y_{t+1} i^t​=ϕπF​Et​π^t+1​+ϕyF​Et​y~​t+1​

    (9) 居民的福利变动

    u(Ct,Nt)−u(C∗,N∗)=uCCˉCt−CˉC+…u(C_t,N_t)-u(C^*,N^*)= u_C \bar C \frac{C_t-\bar C}{C}+\dots u(Ct​,Nt​)−u(C∗,N∗)=uC​CˉCCt​−Cˉ​+…
